content.en:
The Heavenly Spider Battlefield is not in the ordinary dimension, but in the fifth dimension of the Four Thousand Territory, and there is no way to enter the Heavenly Spider Battlefield in the ordinary fourth realm.

However, those overlord-level forces still mastered some passages to enter the Heavenly Spider Battlefield.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the territory of the four thousand, and then came to the ordinary dimensional area corresponding to the Heavenly Spider Battlefield, and then cast a ten-dimensional celestial body, preparing to directly break into the Heavenly Spider Battlefield of the fifth dimension.

But this is not an ordinary area, and the fifth dimension is not so easy to think into.

Ye Tian's ten-dimensional celestial body is currently in the second layer of the Dacheng realm, and there is no problem with being able to freely cross the fourth dimension with his physical body, but it is also possible to tear the barrier of the fifth dimension, but there is no way to stay in the fifth dimension for long, it is estimated that he will have to come out if he enters, otherwise it is easy to get lost in the fifth dimension.

But he only needs to enter the Celestial Spider Battlefield, so there is no need to worry.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's ten-dimensional celestial body broke through layers of dimensions, and soon the fifth dimension opened.

Wow!

Ye Tian's physical body crossed over, easily sensed a huge battlefield area, and then escaped into it.

......

Rumble!!!!

As soon as Ye Tian entered, he fell into a fire robbery area in 243.

The terrifying fire continued to burn his body, and the protective things on his body were burned away.

Even his flesh felt pain under this burning.

He used the extra-dimensional rule realm to compress and protect himself, and coupled with the urging of the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, he resisted the burning of the calamity.

"This is a fire robbery, it's terrible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Even if it is an extradimensional realm, under such a calamity, I am afraid that it only takes a wisp to burn it all.

Subsequently, he kept shuttling and leaving such a fire area, but he encountered the disaster again.

The wind, wandering everywhere.

Therefore, this Celestial Spider Battlefield is full of calamity.

However, the Tribulation Wind in most areas only contains a little bit of the power of the Tribulation Wind, and the power is not terrifying, far inferior to the Tribulation Fire just now.

In addition, Ye Tian has the hand of the wind calamity, and he is not afraid of the wind calamity.

Subsequently, he searched for the bones of those Fourth Realm in this Heavenly Spider Battlefield.

Along the way, he saw too many battlefield traces, too many Fourth Realm bones.

These bones were eroded by the calamity wind, and they had long since turned into piles of white bones, which were of little value, and they could not condense the multi-dimensional essence if they were absorbed by the multi-dimensional treasure bottle.

Moreover, for countless years, there are still a few Fourth Realms to explore, so many good things have still been taken away.

However, Ye Tian still found a lot of treasures.

But the Heavenly Spider Battlefield is extremely dangerous, not only the danger of wind and fire.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying aura locked on Ye Tian.

It was a crimson spider with the smell of fire.

"It's the Fire Raider!"

Ye Tian was slightly solemn.

The reason why the Spider Battlefield is called the Spider Battlefield is because there is a terrible catastrophe creature here, the Spider Raider.

The Spider is a creature born in response to the Multidimensional Tribulation, and can absorb the power of the Multidimensional Tribulation to grow.

However, if the Multidimensional Tribulation is not born, this creature has no potential to grow.

And these creatures are all sapient, they are killing machines.

The Fire Tribulation Spider was born from the Fire Tribulation, and the strength of the Fire Tribulation Spider in front of him was probably between the fourth and fifth day passes, which should not be underestimated.

Ye Tian didn't know if this robber spider was one, in case there were other robber spiders around, it would be a little troublesome

"Fight!"

Ye Tian and this Fire Tribulation Spider were instantly killed.

The Fire Tribulation Spider doesn't have any subtle moves, let alone any multi-dimensional mastery, but the opponent controls the fire robbery attack, which is comparable to the damage of multi-dimensional mastery.

Thundered!!!!!

The fire calamity controlled by the Fire Tribulation Spider has been condensed to the extreme, and its attack power is terrifying.

And Ye Tian's multi-dimensional (ADCE) peerless attack fell on him, only to crack the opponent's body, but he quickly recovered.

Ye Tian has an innate multi-dimensional secret technique, the realm of Wumu, which can continuously provide his own strength, and can perform the multi-dimensional mastery of the four realms infinitely, and he is not afraid of running out of strength.

So, he frantically attacked the Fire Raid Spider.

Gradually, the Fire Tribulation Spider was not lightly injured.

Again.

After Ye Tian injured it, he immediately cast the Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Black Mother Sword.

Rumble!!!

The black mother's sword slammed into its body, directly shattering part of its soul will, causing it to scream miserably.

"Sure enough, the Eighth Dimension Will Peerless can severely damage it and continue to attack!"

Ye Tian cast the Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Technique again and again, and after casting it seven times, he finally killed this Fire Tribulation Spider.

The corpse of the Fire Tribulation Spider should have some value, and Ye Tian put it away.

Then, he quickly left the place.

The Celestial Spider Battlefield is very large, and there are quite a few robbing spiders here, and there are even existences comparable to the sixth day pass or even the seventh day pass.

Without the support of the power of the multi-dimensional tribulation, these calamity spiders could not improve their strength, and some of the injuries hurt the foundation, so they naturally did not dare to run around, so they could only slowly recover from sleep.

Therefore, as long as Ye Tian is careful, even if he only has one life, there is hope of surviving.

If it really threatens enough to make the combat power of the sixth day pass and the seventh day pass fall, who would dare to come in?

Time passed slowly, and a few extradimensional epochs passed.

During this period, Ye Tian fell three times, recondensed three replica bodies, and brought out a lot of resources, including many quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasures, which also made his net worth skyrocket.

What made Ye Tian excited was that he had obtained a quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure - the Multi-dimensional Yan Treasure Mirror!

This quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure can deduce and analyze the extra-dimensional rules, but it needs to be driven by the origin of the extra-dimensional realm in the body, but its usefulness is far beyond the thirteen-fold blood-colored treasure lotus.

As a result, Ye Tian gave up the thirteen-fold blood-colored treasure lotus, and used it specifically to improve the extradimensional rules in the future.

With this multi-dimensional treasure mirror, Ye Tian's extradimensional rules progressed faster.

Five hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

Ye Tian's other copy body comprehended the superdimensional rules in the veins of the Silver Mountain, and made great progress, and this time he finally raised the superdimensional rules to five thousand.

If he didn't have the quasi-innate multi-dimensional supreme treasure multi-dimensional treasure mirror, he wouldn't be able to achieve such a fast efficiency.

However, after the realm of extra-dimensional rules is raised to five thousand realms, and then you can comprehend and cultivate here, the efficiency will be very low.

But it was still more efficient than contemplating in the outside world, so he still didn't leave and continued to meditate on the extradimensional rules here.

this day.

Ye Tian had another huge harvest in the Heavenly Spider Battlefield.
